title: C/Zephyr: include current_channel in build_signed_data() and lichen_announce_view for CCP-9 announce
description: Add current_channel/rx_channel to lichen_announce_view, update LICHEN_ANNOUNCE_MIN_LEN to 94, update parse to read channel byte at offset 3, shift seq/IID etc. Update build_signed_data to include channel byte after seq_num in signed data. Update scheduler build_announce_frame to include and sign current channel (need to decide how scheduler gets current_channel value - perhaps from config or param). Update tests in lichen/tests/routing_announce. This binds the announced channel against tampering for CCP-9 rendezvous. --parent=project-LICHEN-3i18 --type=task --priority=1 --labels=codereview
close_reason: Included rx_channel in lichen_announce_view (offset 3 in parse, after seq in signed_data and frame), updated MIN_LEN to 94, build_signed_data, scheduler build_announce_frame with channel_snapshot, gateway view and parse copy, test build/parse assertions and offsets. Fixed field name per codereview/epic dp4j. Ran codereview 3x (findings filed as codereview beads dsqy and system ones, all fixed with clean final passes). Updated tests/vectors implicitly via parity. All tests pass.
